hero.urgentDesc: Previous policy details are required for depreciation calculation.

sidebar.infoMessage: This data reflects the current process status. You can click on the relevant step for details.

timeline.title: Process Timeline
timeline.noteAdded: A new internal note has been added. Discussed with the insured.
timeline.aiDisclaimer: This explanation was generated by AI to make complex insurance terms understandable.
timeline.noExplanation: No detailed information found for this step.

Towing Service.title: About Towing Service
Towing Service.content: The towing service ensures your vehicle is safely transported to the authorized service center after an accident. This step is initiated automatically; the goal is to protect the damage and ensure correct assessment before appraisal. The towing company is selected from TRAMER-compliant contracted service providers.

File Review.title: About File Review and Registration
File Review.content: During the file review process, the assigned expert verifies all your documents according to the policy terms. Missing documents are identified at this stage and requested to be completed for the process to proceed. Creating a registration number means your request has been officially received into the system.

Appraisal.title: About Vehicle Appraisal
Appraisal.content: Appraisal is a critical step where each damaged area is evaluated individually by a TRAMER-licensed expert. A 'Total Loss' assessment is made if the repair cost of the part exceeds 70% of the cost of a new part. The appraisal report forms the basis for deduction calculations and payment amounts.

Claim Notification.title: About Policy Coverage Verification
Claim Notification.content: Coverage verification determines whether the claim is covered under your insurance policy. The deductible amount is a fixed amount covered by the insured before the claim payment. Exclusions (racing, DUI, etc.) are identified at this stage; it is confirmed that none of them apply.

Deduction Reason.title: About Deduction Reasons
Deduction Reason.content: Deductions are applied within the framework of SEDDK regulations. 'Depreciation' is a legal discount calculated using actuarial tables based on the age and mileage of the vehicle. The policy deductible is a fixed amount defined in article 4.2.1 of the contract. These deductions are legal obligations and cannot be changed.

Payment Information.title: About Payment Process
Payment Information.content: The net compensation amount is transferred to the IBAN registered in your policy via EFT after all deductions are approved. Interbank EFT times are usually 1-2 business days. When the transaction starts, a Movement Number (Transaction ID) will be sent to you. The payment phase can start after the Deduction Reason step is completed.
